titles.en: Chapter on Supplications at the Time of Breaking the Fast Each Night in the Month of Ramadan
Chapter on Supplications at the Time of Breaking the Fast Each Night in the Month of Ramadan

segments: 1850 - كَانَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ إِذَا أَفْطَرَ قَالَ -: « اَللَّهُمَّ لَكَ صُمْنَا وَ عَلَى رِزْقِكَ أَفْطَرْنَا فَتَقَبَّلْهُ مِنَّا ذَهَبَ اَلظَّمَأُ وَ اِبْتَلَّتِ اَلْعُرُوقُ وَ بَقِيَ اَلْأَجْرُ ».
arabic.text: 1850 - كَانَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ إِذَا أَفْطَرَ قَالَ -: « اَللَّهُمَّ لَكَ صُمْنَا وَ عَلَى رِزْقِكَ أَفْطَرْنَا فَتَقَبَّلْهُ مِنَّا ذَهَبَ اَلظَّمَأُ وَ اِبْتَلَّتِ اَلْعُرُوقُ وَ بَقِيَ اَلْأَجْرُ ».

segments:
Hadith.1850 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family), when breaking his fast, would say:
"O Allah (swt), for You we fasted, and upon Your sustenance we have broken our fast. So accept it from us. The thirst has gone, the veins are quenched, and the reward remains."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.1850 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family), when breaking his fast, would say:
"O Allah (swt), for You we fasted, and upon Your sustenance we have broken our fast. So accept it from us. The thirst has gone, the veins are quenched, and the reward remains."

parts.text: كَانَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ

titles.en: Chapter on Supplications at the Time of Breaking the Fast Each Night in the Month of Ramadan

segments: : «تَقُولُ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ عِنْدَ اَلْإِفْطَارِ إِلَى آخِرِهِ: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ اَلَّذِي أَعَانَنَا فَصُمْنَا وَ رَزَقَنَا فَأَفْطَرْنَا اَللَّهُمَّ تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا وَ أَعِنَّا عَلَيْهِ وَ سَلِّمْنَا فِيهِ وَ تَسَلَّمْهُ مِنَّا فِي يُسْرٍ مِنْكَ وَ عَافِيَةٍ اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ اَلَّذِي قَضَى عَنَّا يَوْماً مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ ».
arabic.text: : «تَقُولُ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ عِنْدَ اَلْإِفْطَارِ إِلَى آخِرِهِ: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ اَلَّذِي أَعَانَنَا فَصُمْنَا وَ رَزَقَنَا فَأَفْطَرْنَا اَللَّهُمَّ تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا وَ أَعِنَّا عَلَيْهِ وَ سَلِّمْنَا فِيهِ وَ تَسَلَّمْهُ مِنَّا فِي يُسْرٍ مِنْكَ وَ عَافِيَةٍ اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ اَلَّذِي قَضَى عَنَّا يَوْماً مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ ».

segments:
Hadith.1851 - Abu Basir narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) who said:
"You should say every night of the Month of Ramadan at the time of breaking the fast until its end:
'All praise belongs to Allah (swt), who helped us so we fasted, and provided for us so we broke our fast. O Allah (swt), accept it from us, assist us in it, and keep us safe in it. Accept it from us with ease and well-being from You. All praise belongs to Allah (swt), who completed for us a day of the Month of Ramadan.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.1851 - Abu Basir narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) who said:
"You should say every night of the Month of Ramadan at the time of breaking the fast until its end:
'All praise belongs to Allah (swt), who helped us so we fasted, and provided for us so we broke our fast. O Allah (swt), accept it from us, assist us in it, and keep us safe in it. Accept it from us with ease and well-being from You. All praise belongs to Allah (swt), who completed for us a day of the Month of Ramadan.'"

narratorChain.raw: 1851 - وَ رَوَى أَبُو بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Supplications at the Time of Breaking the Fast Each Night in the Month of Ramadan

segments: 1852 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «يُسْتَجَابُ دُعَاءُ اَلصَّائِمِ عِنْدَ اَلْإِفْطَارِ.
arabic.text: 1852 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «يُسْتَجَابُ دُعَاءُ اَلصَّائِمِ عِنْدَ اَلْإِفْطَارِ.

segments: Hadith.1852 - Imam (as) said: "The supplication of the fasting person is answered at the time of breaking the fast."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.1852 - Imam (as) said: "The supplication of the fasting person is answered at the time of breaking the fast."
